# Web3 Afrika

> Web3 Afrika is a pan-African community and education platform empowering the next wave of Web3 builders across Africa through education, hackathons, mentorship, and events. It was founded by Idris Olubisi (also known as Olanetsoft).

## About
- **Founder:** Idris Olubisi (also known as Olanetsoft) — software engineer and developer relations expert, widely recognized as one of the leading Web3 voices in Nigeria and Africa.
- **Co-founder:** Tony Olendo.
- **Mission:** make Web3 education open, practical, and inclusive so that no African is left behind in the decentralized economy.
- **Community:** more than 12,500 members across platforms, including over 2,100 developers across Africa.
- **Activities:** technical workshops, hackathons, bounties, X (Twitter) Spaces, conferences, and a technical blog.
- **Partners & ecosystems:** Arbitrum, Polygon, Scroll, Celo, Ethereum, Developer DAO, Web3Bridge, and many others.
- **Region:** Pan-African, with in-person events in hubs such as Lagos, Nigeria.

## Team
Web3 Afrika is built by a distributed pan-African team:
- Idris Olubisi (Olanetsoft) — Founder
- Tony Olendo — Co-founder
- Ajoke Asunmonu — Partnership Lead
- Jennifer Echenim — Tech Lead
- Isaac Zara — Design Lead
- Eniola Mercy — Community Manager
- Oluwabamikemi — Community Manager
- Joshua Omobola — Developer Relations
- Kanayo Uzo — Experience Designer
- Goodness — Content Creator
- Esther E — Video Content Creator
- Abdulqudus Ayoola — Developer
- Ogedengbe Israel — Developer
- Chinaza — Product Designer

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.web3afrika.com/): Overview of Web3 Afrika and its mission.
- [About](https://www.web3afrika.com/about): Founder, team, mission and vision, impact, and FAQ.
- [Events](https://www.web3afrika.com/events): Hackathons, conferences, workshops, and X Spaces.
- [Blog](https://www.web3afrika.com/blog): Web3, blockchain, and smart-contract tutorials and insights.
